scenes.action: Camera lingers in semi-darkness on a cracked stone tablet, slowly panning across faint, ambiguous carvings of hands reaching but frozen. Shadows flicker over the fractured surface, emphasizing the jagged breaks in the stone motif.
scenes.narration_segment: Fear tastes like stone in the mouth. [PAUSE]

scenes.action: Handheld, slightly shaky close tracking shot of a dark, claustrophobic cave interior where a shadowy figure swallows small, indistinct shapes representing newborns. The fractured golden medallion lies cracked on the ground, partially hidden in shadow, with a slow push-in lingering on its broken edges.
scenes.narration_segment: In darkness, Cronus swallows his newborns—each gulp a desperate, silent bargain with fate. [PAUSE] The world shrinks, love curdles; dread passes from father to child, unspoken yet heavy as granite.

scenes.action: Low-angle shot of a fractured stone wall split by a jagged crack in the foreground, behind which a small figure is hidden in deep shadow. The camera slowly pushes in on a partially mended but still cracked family heirloom—a split golden medallion—held tightly in the figure’s hand.
scenes.narration_segment: Yet one child escapes. Rhea’s secret—the child hidden in shadows, raised apart. [PAUSE] Cronus grows hollow, haunted by what he cannot consume. [PAUSE]

scenes.action: Handheld close tracking shot with slight shakiness capturing a low-angle view of a figure standing defiantly against a fractured stone background. The sky above is obscured by cracked stone slabs, slowly splitting apart as the camera lingers on the fractured family medallion lying shattered at the figure’s feet.
scenes.narration_segment: When Zeus returns, the sky splits. The gods rage, not for glory, but because they were broken first. [EMPHASIS]

scenes.action: Wide, static shot of a cold, ruined stone altar scattered with broken fragments of the family heirloom medallion. The camera slowly pushes in on the cracked medallion as the ambient light dims, emphasizing distance and isolation between figures off-screen.
scenes.narration_segment: Victory comes—Zeus crowned in the ruins of his father’s hunger. [PAUSE] But the taste of stone lingers. The throne is cold, the old wounds unhealed. [PAUSE] Power changes hands, but fear survives, waiting for its next heir.
